channel.title: Maintainership on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Maintainership on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: k8s: Open source maintainership in the age of AI
item.description:
Kubernetes says AI-assisted contributions are welcome, but maintainers must keep human accountability, transparency, and verification at the center. The community is also testing AI review tools such as Copilot and CodeRabbit to help with pull request review and maintainer workload.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog
